Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I thought I was accustomed to Christmas decorations by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}But for some reason, they look especially beautiful today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}I would honestly be fine with anything...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Well, shall we stroll around for a bit?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Even a simple walk with you is quite pleasant.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}No manner of extravagant party could offer an experience like this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Here. I'd like you to have something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Received (Item name)[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I put in a special order for you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 1 25 25}My hope is we take some time to enjoy it together, once things have settled down...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}I'm glad I was able to give this to you today. Thank you, {f 4 1}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}For once, I feel... calm. Like I'm finally at peace.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I should probably let you know...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 3 25 25}When I see you enjoying yourself with Yukari or the others, I get... restless.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}But at the same time, it's a pleasure to be reminded of these feelings I have.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}In all honesty... I never thought I'd be allowed to be this happy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shared a tender moment with Mitsuru...[n]{f 1 1}
